summary: Interest at floor (3) after Jan 28 spike decay; floor effect creates upward asymmetry
content:
Key findings:
- Massive spike to 100 on Jan 28 (town hall attack - sprayed with liquid)
- Rapid decay to 3 by Feb 5 (already at historical floor of 1-3)
- Court case pending for attacker (DOJ charges filed Jan 29)
- Floor effect: at value 3, limited room to decrease, much room to increase
- Historical quiet-period range: 2-6, average ~4-5
- Simulation: P(increase)≈55-58%, P(same)≈22-24%, P(decrease)≈18-20%
- But simulation may overweight increase due to generous news bump assumption
